detectors.description:
Ownable.transferOwner(address) (DepositCapsule.sol#31-45) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- address(this).balance == 0 (DepositCapsule.sol#35)

DepositCapsule.kill() (DepositCapsule.sol#123-129) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- address(this).balance >= 0 (DepositCapsule.sol#125)

Ownable.transferOwner(address)._owner (DepositCapsule.sol#31) lacks a zero-check on :
		- Owner = _owner (DepositCapsule.sol#39)
Modifier Ownable.onlyOwner() (DepositCapsule.sol#27) does not always execute _; or revert
detectors.markdown: Modifier [Ownable.onlyOwner()](DepositCapsule.sol#L27) does not always execute _; or revert

detectors.description:
DepositCapsule.withdraw(uint256) (DepositCapsule.sol#101-117) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- now >= openDate (DepositCapsule.sol#103)
detectors.markdown:
[DepositCapsule.withdraw(uint256)](DepositCapsule.sol#L101-L117) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [now >= openDate](DepositCapsule.sol#L103)

detectors.description:

	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy

	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2

	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.23 (DepositCapsule.sol#17)

detectors.description: Variable DepositCapsule.Owner (DepositCapsule.sol#55) is not in mixedCase
Variable Ownable.Owner (DepositCapsule.sol#23) is not in mixedCase
Parameter Ownable.transferOwner(address)._owner (DepositCapsule.sol#31) is not in mixedCase

Reentrancy in DepositCapsule.withdraw(uint256) (DepositCapsule.sol#101-117):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.send(amount) (DepositCapsule.sol#109)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawal(msg.sender,amount) (DepositCapsule.sol#111)
